msg: Per-repo memory shard opened (mirrors autocss-com/autocss). README is kept MINIMAL (only what a developer changes from the stock scaffold); the full change history lives here so Claude + the maintainer have a complete accounting. A per-repo CLAUDE.md comes later, when this demo is tied to a real product.

name: Vue data-layer demo on GitHub Pages
what: Standard Vite + Vue 3 app (<script setup>, ref/computed/onMounted) that fetches its own public/data/records.json (AutoCSS [{id,title,intro,items:[]}] contract shape) and renders it as a <table> with loading/error states. vite base '/vue/'. GitHub Actions workflow builds + deploys dist/ to Pages. Removed the Vite+Vue starter demo (HelloWorld, components, assets, demo styles).

name: attach AutoCSS scaffold + remote styles
what: Wrapped the app in the default AutoCSS Holy-Grail scaffold (app-container down to <article>; the app's content-level elements moved INSIDE <article>). Linked the remote AutoCSS stylesheets from https://autocss.com in index.html, same @layer order as autocss/index.html (themes.css + transitions.css left commented out to match the source). STYLES ONLY — no AutoCSS JS. Vue quirk: vite.config.js template.compilerOptions.isCustomElement=(t)=>t.startsWith('app-') so Vue doesn't try to resolve app-* as components.

name: merged root + native CSS off + tag-based mount
what: (a) The framework root IS the AutoCSS <app-container>: App.vue is now a multi-root template rendering the scaffold's children (no wrapper), and #app{display:contents} was removed. (b) Native stylesheets COMMENTED OUT so the remote AutoCSS CSS is the sole styling source: import './style.css' in src/main.js and import './App.css' in src/App.vue. (c) MOUNT ON THE <app-container> ELEMENT BY TAG: createApp(App).mount('app-container') [tag selector, was '#app'], and index.html body is just <app-container></app-container> (no id). isCustomElement is still required (app-banner/app-logo/app-legal/app-version remain in the template).

msg: README minimized to only 'what a developer changes from the default scaffold' (per maintainer: devs want to move fast; a long change list looks like a lot of work when it isn't). The detailed change history was moved here + PROGRESS.json, mirroring the autocss repo's memory system.

Every change browser-verified via Playwright chromium (a local server maps the /vue/ subpath -> dist; autocss.com is stubbed as empty CSS because this sandbox can't reach it through the egress cert — real styles load on Pages). Asserted: app-container present, app-container>header/nav/aside/footer, main>article, table INSIDE article, 6 rows, h1='Vue data layer', appErrors=[] (no [Vue warn] either). All PASS. Live: https://autocss-com.github.io/vue/
